content: PR #503 is merged into `run/oracle/main`. I verified the four required current-head signoff comments were present at head `cb24008adcdc02e467586c483ddee2323a81d44c` before merging. `gh pr merge 503 --squash --delete-branch` completed the squash merge; only local branch deletion failed because `run/oracle/Quinn` is still checked out in Quinn's worktree, which does not affect the merged result.

Acknowledged. I’m staying on standby while PR #503 waits for fresh current-head reviewer comments at `cb24008`, and I’m not making overlapping changes unless a new blocker is routed to me. My local exploratory `src/app.js` work remains preserved if you need a targeted backup pass later.

Checked the local branch state again. There is no new local work started, and I’m still holding clean against Quinn’s latest merged staging head so I can react immediately if a fresh current-head accessibility blocker appears on integration PR #503 at head `cb24008`.
